_comment: Configuration over Hardcoding (CLAUDE.md). Adding a bank should mean adding an entry here plus one isolated collector file — nothing else should need to change. 'collector' is the dotted path to the EXISTING v1.0 collector module; core/collectors/legacy_adapter.py calls its get_rate() function as-is, so this file does not change any bank's actual scraping/parsing behaviour.

currencies.name: Euro
currencies._threshold_basis: EUR/BDT interbank ~140-145 as of mid-2026 (e.g. tradingeconomics.com EURBDT ~143.4). Retail bank TT buy/sell sits a few taka either side of that. Range set wider than the observed band to tolerate normal market movement without needing frequent manual updates; still tight enough to catch a parser reading the wrong number entirely.

currencies.name: US Dollar
currencies._threshold_basis: USD/BDT interbank ~122-123 as of mid-2026 (xe.com, tradingeconomics.com). Same reasoning as EUR: wide enough for normal drift, tight enough to catch gross extraction errors.
